narrative:
New Market Township has 1,316 registered voters, with 50.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.1 percentage points.
